This cannot be prevented even with very careful maintenance, hygiene and disinfection and the ideal solution is to replace it regularly at least once a year. You will appreciate the spare mouthpiece even if more than one person uses the inhaler and it is necessary for hygienic reasons for each person to have their own mouthpiece. Thanks to the quick and easy exchange, your inhaler will be as good as new again, ready to help you in case of illness. The mouthpiece is made of PVC and cannot be sterilised by boiling.
